name: Prevent live process recovery from deleting Goal Agent transcripts before workflow consumption

rounds.implementation_report: Added a filesystem-backed process artifact handoff lease held from Goal Agent registration through PTY reader join, transcript read, and final SSE grace period. Dead-process recovery now persists truthful exited/interrupted state immediately but defers transcript/channel/registry deletion while the workflow owns the lease; release or owner exit makes cleanup available, preventing both NotFound transcript races and indefinite leaks. Added deterministic Goal Agent completion/recovery and deferred-cleanup lifecycle regressions. Verification: focused handoff tests passed (1/1 each); all Goal Agent session tests passed (4/4); completion-recovery and reaper lifecycle tests passed (1/1 each); cargo check --all-targets passed; cargo fmt --all -- --check passed; git diff --check passed. Full cargo test --lib ran 471 tests: 470 passed and 1 unrelated timing test failed, warmed_goal_create_post_completes_under_fifty_milliseconds_at_current_scale, at 126.462087ms versus <50ms; isolated rerun also failed at 139.95912ms. cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings failed on six unrelated existing lints: missing_const_for_thread_local in coordination.rs; too_many_arguments twice in merging/mod.rs and once in work_items/service.rs; if_same_then_else and ptr_arg in quality/tests.rs. No merge, approval, force Git operation, history rewrite, worktree discard, or durable Goal-state edit was performed.
rounds.prompt: Fix the confirmed Goal Agent transcript handoff race without weakening process liveness or cleanup guarantees. Evidence: Round 1 of Goal 00000SZ41923HGWZSREC2JW001 failed with `failed to read Goal Agent transcript /home/buddy/projects/refine/run/8082/processes/goal-agent-2bfd9a9c-b7b9-425b-84d3-ac5874a5af9e.stdout.log: No such file or directory (os error 2)`. In `run_goal_agent_session`, a completed signal updates metadata and kills the PTY child, then joins the output reader and reads `stdout_path`. Concurrent `/api/processes` or diagnostics process summaries call `FileProcessSupervisor::recover`; `recover_running_process` observes the now-dead PID and calls `remove_process_artifacts`, deleting the same stdout file before the workflow-owned session consumes it. Add a deterministic regression that drives completion while live process recovery/status observation runs, and make artifact ownership/cleanup ordered so the workflow can always consume the flushed transcript before removal. Preserve truthful dead-process reconciliation, terminal reattachment/output behavior, provider/authentication errors, and process cleanup; do not paper over NotFound, disable liveness checks, leak artifacts indefinitely, approve or merge, force Git, rewrite history, discard worktrees, or edit durable Goal state directly. Run focused race/lifecycle tests plus relevant library, all-target, format, and diff gates; report every failure and final result exactly.

diagnostics: No Quality tests or migrated commands are configured; evaluation was a no-op.
